# site-marcenaria[Uploading planejadosousa (11).html…]()
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="description" content="Móveis planejados sob medida em São Paulo, Alto Tietê e ABC Paulista. Cozinha, quarto, escritório e empresas. Orçamento gratuito.">
<title>PlanejadoSousa | Móveis Planejados em São Paulo</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>:root{--g:#C4973A;--gl:#E8C87A;--dk:#1A1510;--cr:#F5F0E8;--ac:#2C4A3E;--mt:#7A6A58;--br:rgba(196,151,58,.2)}*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}html{scroll-behavior:smooth}body{font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;background:var(--cr);color:#2D2418;overflow-x:hidden}nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:1.1rem 4%;background:rgba(253,251,247,.93);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--br);transition:box-shadow .3s}.nlogo{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--dk)}.nlogo span{color:var(--g)}.nlinks{display:flex;gap:1.8rem;list-style:none}.nlinks a{font-size:.85rem;color:#3D3128;text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}.nlinks a:hover{color:var(--g)}.ncta{background:var(--g);color:#fff;padding:.55rem 1.3rem;border-radius:2px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s}.ncta:hover{background:#6B4428}#hero{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:center;padding:7rem 4% 4rem;gap:4rem;background:var(--cr);position:relative;overflow:hidden}#hero::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-20%;right:-10%;width:60vw;height:120%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(196,151,58,.07),transparent 70%);pointer-events:none}.ey{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:1.5rem}.ey::before{content:"";width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--g)}.ht{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:clamp(2.8rem,5.5vw,4.6rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.05;color:var(--dk);margin-bottom:1.5rem}.ht em{font-style:italic;color:var(--g)}.hd{font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.75;color:var(--mt);max-width:480px;margin-bottom:2.5rem}.hbtns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}.bp{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;background:var(--dk);color:#fff;padding:.9rem 1.9rem;border-radius:2px;font-size:.84rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s}.bp:hover{background:var(--g);transform:translateY(-2px)}.bg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;border:1px solid var(--br);color:#3D3128;padding:.9rem 1.9rem;border-radius:2px;font-size:.84rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s}.bg:hover{border-color:var(--g);color:var(--g)}.hst{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;margin-top:3.5rem;padding-top:2rem;border-top:1px solid var(--br)}.sn2{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--dk);display:block;line-height:1}.sl{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--mt);margin-top:.3rem;letter-spacing:.06em}.hv{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto auto;gap:12px}.him{border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;background:#8B6F4E;position:relative}.him:first-child{grid-row:span 2}.hi{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:1rem;font-style:italic;min-height:140px}.hbg{position:absolute;bottom:14px;left:14px;background:#FDFBF7;padding:.65rem 1rem;border-radius:3px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--dk);border-left:3px solid var(--g)}.c1{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#6B5544,#3D2D1E)}.c2{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#4A5E58,#2C3C38)}.c3{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#7A6048,#4A3828)}section{padding:6rem 4%}.stg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--g);margin-bottom:.9rem}.stg::before{content:"";width:22px;height:1px;background:var(--g)}.sti{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--dk);line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1rem}.sti em{color:var(--g);font-style:italic}.ssu{font-size:1rem;color:var(--mt);line-height:1.7;max-width:560px}#sv{background:var(--dk)}#sv .sti{color:#F5F0E8}#sv .ssu{color:rgba(245,240,232,.5)}#sv .stg{color:var(--gl)}#sv .stg::before{background:var(--gl)}.svh{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:3rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem}.svg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}.sc{background:rgba(26,21,16,.8);padding:2rem 1.7rem;transition:background .3s}.sc:hover{background:rgba(196,151,58,.1)}.si{width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid rgba(196,151,58,.3);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}.sn{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5F0E8;margin-bottom:.5rem}.sd{font-size:.83rem;color:rgba(245,240,232,.5);line-height:1.65}.sts{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;margin-top:1rem}.atag{font-size:.67rem;background:rgba(196,151,58,.12);color:var(--gl);padding:.22rem .6rem;border-radius:2px}#pt{background:var(--cr);padding-bottom:0}.ph3{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1.5rem}.fbs{display:flex;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:1.8rem}.fb{padding:.38rem .95rem;border-radius:100px;border:1.5px solid rgba(196,151,58,.28);background:transparent;color:var(--mt);font-size:.77rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif}.fb:hover{border-color:#C4973A;color:#C4973A}.fb.on{background:#C4973A;border-color:#C4973A;color:#fff}.mg{columns:3;column-gap:10px}.fi{break-inside:avoid;margin-bottom:10px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer}.fi img{width:100%;display:block;transition:transform .4s}.fi:hover img{transform:scale(1.04)}.fo{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(18,13,8,.85),transparent 60%);opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:1rem}.fi:hover .fo{opacity:1}.fn{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:.88rem;font-style:italic;color:#F5F0E8}.ft{font-size:.67rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#C4973A;margin-top:2px}.fz{position:absolute;top:.6rem;right:.6rem;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(196,151,58,.85);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;color:#fff;font-size:.8rem}.fi:hover .fz{opacity:1}#ua{margin-top:1.5rem;border:2px dashed rgba(196,151,58,.28);border-radius:5px;padding:1.8rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;background:rgba(196,151,58,.03)}#ua:hover{border-color:#C4973A;background:rgba(196,151,58,.07)}#lb{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;background:rgba(5,3,2,.96);align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:1rem}#lb.open{display:flex}.lbw{max-width:900px;width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center}#lbi{max-height:78vh;max-width:100%;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;box-shadow:0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.7)}.lbb{width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:.8rem 0 0;gap:1rem}.lbn{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:rgba(196,151,58,.15);border:1px solid rgba(196,151,58,.3);color:#E8C87A;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;font-size:1.5rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}.lbn:hover{background:rgba(196,151,58,.3)}.lbpv{left:1rem}.lbnx{right:1rem}.lbcl{position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1.2rem;background:transparent;border:none;color:rgba(245,240,232,.4);font-size:1.3rem;cursor:pointer}#pc{background:#FDFBF7}.pg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--br);border:1px solid var(--br);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:3rem}.pas{background:#FDFBF7;padding:2rem 1.6rem}.pn{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:3rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--br);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.9rem;display:block}.pt{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--dk);margin-bottom:.5rem}.pd{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--mt);line-height:1.65}#rg{background:var(--ac)}#rg .sti{color:#fff}#rg .ssu{color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}#rg .stg{color:var(--gl)}#rg .stg::before{background:var(--gl)}.rgg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;margin-top:2.5rem;align-items:start}.rlist{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.7rem}.ri{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.9rem;padding:.85rem 1.2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:4px;font-size:.87rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);transition:background .2s}.ri:hover{background:rgba(196,151,58,.15)}.rd{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--g);flex-shrink:0;display:inline-block}.rcta{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:8px;padding:2.2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2rem}.ct{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1.2}.cs{font-size:.87rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:.5rem}.bwa{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;background:#25D366;color:#fff;padding:.9rem 1.6rem;border-radius:4px;font-size:.87rem;font-weight:500;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s;align-self:flex-start}.bwa:hover{background:#1aad54;transform:translateY(-2px)}#dp{background:var(--cr)}.dg{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.4rem;margin-top:3rem}.dc{background:#FDFBF7;border:1px solid var(--br);border-radius:4px;padding:1.8rem}.ds{color:var(--g);font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;letter-spacing:.1em}.dt{font-size:.87rem;line-height:1.75;color:#3D3128;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:1.3rem}.da{font-size:.77rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--dk)}.dl{font-size:.71rem;color:var(--mt);margin-top:.2rem}#ct{background:var(--dk);padding:6rem 4%;text-align:center}#ct .sti{color:#F5F0E8;text-align:center}#ct .ssu{color:rgba(245,240,232,.5);text-align:center;margin:0 auto 2.5rem}#ct .stg{justify-content:center;color:var(--gl)}#ct .stg::before{background:var(--gl)}.ctbs{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}footer{background:#110D09;padding:2.2rem 4%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem}.fl2{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:rgba(245,240,232,.55)}.fl2 span{color:var(--g)}.flks{display:flex;gap:1.4rem}.flks a{font-size:.74rem;color:rgba(245,240,232,.3);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}.flks a:hover{color:var(--gl)}.fig{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;font-size:.74rem;color:rgba(245,240,232,.3);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}.fig:hover{color:var(--gl)}.waf{position:fixed;bottom:1.8rem;right:1.8rem;z-index:200;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:#25D366;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(37,211,102,.4);transition:transform .25s;animation:wp 2.5s infinite}.waf:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}@keyframes wp{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(37,211,102,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 8px 44px rgba(37,211,102,.65)}}.ain{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}.ain.vis{opacity:1;transform:none}@media(max-width:900px){#hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding-top:5rem}.hv{display:none}.pg{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.rgg{grid-template-columns:1fr}.dg{grid-template-columns:1fr}.nlinks{display:none}.mg{columns:2}}@media(max-width:560px){.pg{grid-template-columns:1fr}nav{padding:1rem 5%}.mg{columns:1}}</style>
</head>
<body>
<nav>
<div class="nlogo">Planejado<span>Sousa</span></div>
<ul class="nlinks"><li><a href="#sv">Serviços</a></li><li><a href="#pt">Portfólio</a></li><li><a href="#pc">Processo</a></li><li><a href="#rg">Regiões</a></li></ul>
<a href="#" class="ncta" id="nav-wa">Orçamento Grátis</a>
</nav>
<section id="hero">
<div class="ain">
<div class="ey">Móveis planejados sob medida</div>
<h1 class="ht">Cada espaço<br>merece ser<br><em>único.</em></h1>
<p class="hd">Transformamos ambientes residenciais e comerciais em São Paulo, Alto Tietê e ABC Paulista. Do projeto à entrega, cuidamos de cada detalhe.</p>
<div class="hbtns"><a href="#" class="bp wa-btn">Quero meu orçamento</a><a href="#pt" class="bg">Ver projetos →</a></div>
<div class="hst"><div><span class="sn2">97+</span><div class="sl">Projetos entregues</div></div><div><span class="sn2">100%</span><div class="sl">Clientes satisfeitos</div></div><div><span class="sn2">3</span><div class="sl">Regiões atendidas</div></div></div>
</div>
<div class="hv ain" style="transition-delay:.2s">
<div class="him"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Escritório" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover"><div class="hbg">✦ Projeto aprovado</div></div>
<div class="him"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cozinha Planejada" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover"></div>
<div class="him"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Comercial / Empresa" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover"></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="sv">
<div class="svh ain"><div><div class="stg">O que fazemos</div><h2 class="sti">Soluções para todo tipo de ambiente</h2><p class="ssu">Do planejamento ao acabamento final — você aprova cada etapa antes da execução.</p></div></div>
<div class="svg ain"><div class="sc"><div class="si">🏠</div><div class="sn">Residencial</div><p class="sd">Cozinha, quarto, sala e closet planejados para o seu lar.</p><div class="sts"><span class="atag">Cozinha</span><span class="atag">Quarto</span><span class="atag">Sala</span><span class="atag">Closet</span></div></div><div class="sc"><div class="si">💼</div><div class="sn">Escritório</div><p class="sd">Ambientes de trabalho produtivos e organizados.</p><div class="sts"><span class="atag">Home office</span><span class="atag">Mesa</span><span class="atag">Estante</span></div></div><div class="sc"><div class="si">🏢</div><div class="sn">Comercial</div><p class="sd">Lojas, consultórios e recepções sob medida.</p><div class="sts"><span class="atag">Recepção</span><span class="atag">Loja</span><span class="atag">Consultório</span></div></div><div class="sc"><div class="si">📐</div><div class="sn">Projeto 3D</div><p class="sd">Projeto completo em 3D. Você aprova antes da execução.</p><div class="sts"><span class="atag">Projeto 3D</span><span class="atag">Consultoria</span></div></div></div>
</section>
<section id="pt">
<div class="ph3 ain"><div><div class="stg">Portfólio</div><h2 class="sti">Projetos que <em>inspiram</em></h2></div><a href="https://www.instagram.com/planejadosousa/" class="bg" target="_blank">Ver no Instagram →</a></div>
<div class="fbs ain"><button class="fb on" data-f="todos">Todos</button><button class="fb" data-f="Cozinha">Cozinha</button><button class="fb" data-f="Quarto">Quarto</button><button class="fb" data-f="Home Office">Home Office</button><button class="fb" data-f="Sala">Sala</button><button class="fb" data-f="Escritório">Escritório</button><button class="fb" data-f="Comercial">Comercial</button></div>
<div id="gal" class="mg ain"></div>
<div id="ua">
<div style="font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:.4rem">📸</div>
<p style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:.95rem;color:#C4973A;margin-bottom:.25rem">Adicionar fotos de projetos</p>
<p style="font-size:.78rem;color:#7A6A58">Clique ou arraste — JPG, PNG, WEBP</p>
<input type="file" id="fup" accept="image/*" multiple style="display:none">
</div>
<div id="lb"><button class="lbn lbpv">&#8249;</button><div class="lbw"><img id="lbi" src="" alt=""><div class="lbb"><div><p id="lbl" style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:.9rem;color:#F5F0E8;margin:0 0 2px"></p><p id="lbc" style="font-size:.7rem;color:rgba(245,240,232,.4);margin:0"></p></div><a href="#" class="wa-btn" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;background:#25D366;color:#fff;padding:.48rem .95rem;border-radius:3px;font-size:.77rem;font-weight:500;text-decoration:none"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg> Quero um igual</a></div></div><button class="lbn lbnx">&#8250;</button><button class="lbcl">✕</button></div>
</section>
<section id="pc">
<div class="ain" style="text-align:center;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto"><div class="stg" style="justify-content:center">Como trabalhamos</div><h2 class="sti">Do primeiro contato à entrega perfeita</h2><p class="ssu" style="margin:0 auto">Simples, transparente e pensado para você.</p></div>
<div class="pg ain"><div class="pas"><span class="pn">01</span><div class="pt">Consulta gratuita</div><p class="pd">Entendemos o espaço, estilo e orçamento. Sem compromisso.</p></div><div class="pas"><span class="pn">02</span><div class="pt">Projeto 3D</div><p class="pd">Visualize tudo antes de aprovar qualquer execução.</p></div><div class="pas"><span class="pn">03</span><div class="pt">Produção sob medida</div><p class="pd">Marcenaria executa com materiais de primeira.</p></div><div class="pas"><span class="pn">04</span><div class="pt">Entrega e instalação</div><p class="pd">Acompanhamos até você estar 100% satisfeito.</p></div></div>
</section>
<section id="rg">
<div class="rgg"><div class="ain"><div class="stg">Onde atendemos</div><h2 class="sti">São Paulo, Alto Tietê e ABC Paulista</h2><p class="ssu" style="margin-bottom:2rem">Atendemos toda a Grande São Paulo. Visita sem custo adicional.</p><div class="rlist"><div class="ri"><span class="rd"></span>São Paulo (todas as zonas)</div><div class="ri"><span class="rd"></span>Mogi das Cruzes · Suzano · Poá</div><div class="ri"><span class="rd"></span>Arujá · Itaquaquecetuba</div><div class="ri"><span class="rd"></span>Santo André · São Bernardo · São Caetano</div><div class="ri"><span class="rd"></span>Diadema · Mauá · Ribeirão Pires</div></div></div>
<div class="rcta ain" style="transition-delay:.15s"><div><div class="ct">Está na região? Fale agora.</div><p class="cs">Orçamento gratuito, sem compromisso. Resposta em até 2 horas.</p></div><a href="#" class="bwa wa-btn"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg> Chamar no WhatsApp</a></div></div>
</section>
<section id="dp">
<div class="ain" style="text-align:center;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto"><div class="stg" style="justify-content:center">Depoimentos</div><h2 class="sti">O que dizem<br>nossos <em>clientes</em></h2></div>
<div class="dg ain"><div class="dc"><div class="ds">★★★★★</div><p class="dt">"A cozinha ficou incrível. Acompanhou tudo do projeto à instalação. Superou minhas expectativas."</p><div class="da">Ana Paula M.</div><div class="dl">Mogi das Cruzes · Cozinha</div></div><div class="dc"><div class="ds">★★★★★</div><p class="dt">"Home office e quarto do casal. Atendimento impecável e resultado exatamente o que eu queria."</p><div class="da">Rafael S.</div><div class="dl">São Paulo · Home office + Quarto</div></div><div class="dc"><div class="ds">★★★★★</div><p class="dt">"Recepção da minha clínica ficou muito profissional. Pacientes sempre elogiam. Recomendo!"</p><div class="da">Dra. Carla F.</div><div class="dl">Santo André · Comercial</div></div></div>
</section>
<section id="ct">
<div class="stg">Pronto para começar?</div>
<h2 class="sti ain">Seu ambiente dos sonhos começa com uma mensagem.</h2>
<p class="ssu ain">Orçamento gratuito, sem compromisso. Respondemos em até 2 horas.</p>
<div class="ctbs ain"><a href="#" class="bwa wa-btn"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg> Quero meu orçamento grátis</a><a href="https://www.instagram.com/planejadosousa/" class="bg" style="color:rgba(245,240,232,.55);border-color:rgba(245,240,232,.14)" target="_blank">Ver projetos no Instagram →</a></div>
</section>
<footer>
<div class="fl2">Planejado<span>Sousa</span></div>
<div class="flks"><a href="#sv">Serviços</a><a href="#pt">Portfólio</a><a href="#pc">Processo</a><a href="#rg">Regiões</a></div>
<a href="https://www.instagram.com/planejadosousa/" class="fig" target="_blank"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/></svg> @planejadosousa</a>
</footer>
<a href="#" class="waf wa-btn" title="WhatsApp"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg></a>
<script>
var F=[{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Escritório"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Comercial / Empresa"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Sala de Estar"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Área de Lazer"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Sala de Estar"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Closet / Guarda-roupa"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Escritório"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Banheiro"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Closet / Guarda-roupa"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Cozinha Planejada"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Banheiro"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Comercial / Empresa"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Closet / Guarda-roupa"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Banheiro"},{"s":"data:image/jpeg;base64,","l":"Escritório"}];
var _waPhone="5511984012395";
var _waMsg="Ol%C3%A1!%20Vi%20os%20projetos%20no%20site%20da%20PlanejadoSousa%20e%20quero%20um%20or%C3%A7amento%20gratuito.%20%F0%9F%AA%B5";
var _waLink="https://wa.me/message/GHFW5D3P5R5FE1";
function WA(){var base=_waPhone?"https://wa.me/"+_waPhone:""+_waLink;return base+"?text="+_waMsg;}
document.querySelectorAll(".wa-btn").forEach(function(a){a.addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();window.open(WA(),"_blank");});});
document.getElementById("nav-wa").addEventListener("click",function(e){e.preventDefault();window.open(WA(),"_blank");});
var filtro="todos",lbList=[],lbIdx=0;
function catF(l){var lo=l.toLowerCase();if(lo.indexOf("cozinha")>=0)return"Cozinha";if(lo.indexOf("quarto")>=0||lo.indexOf("closet")>=0)return"Quarto";if(lo.indexOf("home")>=0||lo.indexOf("office")>=0)return"Home Office";if(lo.indexOf("sala")>=0)return"Sala";if(lo.indexOf("comercial")>=0||lo.indexOf("empresa")>=0)return"Comercial";if(lo.indexOf("escrit")>=0)return"Escritório";return"Outros";}
function renderGal(){
  var g=document.getElementById("gal");g.innerHTML="";
  if(!F.length){g.innerHTML="<div style='column-span:all;text-align:center;padding:3rem;color:#7A6A58'><p style='font-size:2.5rem'>🪵</p><p style='margin-top:.7rem'>Adicione fotos abaixo</p></div>";return;}
  F.forEach(function(f,i){
    var c=catF(f.l);
    if(filtro!=="todos"&&c!==filtro)return;
    var el=document.createElement("div");el.className="fi";
    var img=document.createElement("img");img.src=f.s;img.alt=f.l;img.loading="lazy";
    var ov=document.createElement("div");ov.className="fo";
    ov.innerHTML="<p class='fn'>"+f.l+"</p><p class='ft'>"+c+"</p>";
    var zm=document.createElement("div");zm.className="fz";zm.textContent="⤢";
    el.appendChild(img);el.appendChild(ov);el.appendChild(zm);
    (function(idx){el.addEventListener("click",function(){openLB(idx);});})(i);
    g.appendChild(el);
  });
}
document.querySelectorAll(".fb").forEach(function(b){b.addEventListener("click",function(){document.querySelectorAll(".fb").forEach(function(x){x.classList.remove("on");});this.classList.add("on");filtro=this.dataset.f;renderGal();});});
function openLB(idx){lbList=F.filter(function(f){return filtro==="todos"||catF(f.l)===filtro;});lbIdx=lbList.findIndex(function(f,i){return F.indexOf(f)===idx;});if(lbIdx<0)lbIdx=0;showLB();document.getElementById("lb").classList.add("open");document.body.style.overflow="hidden";}
function showLB(){if(!lbList.length)return;var f=lbList[lbIdx];document.getElementById("lbi").src=f.s;document.getElementById("lbl").textContent=f.l;document.getElementById("lbc").textContent=(lbIdx+1)+" de "+lbList.length;}
function mvLB(d){lbIdx=(lbIdx+d+lbList.length)%lbList.length;showLB();}
function closeLB(){document.getElementById("lb").classList.remove("open");document.body.style.overflow="";}
document.querySelector(".lbpv").addEventListener("click",function(){mvLB(-1);});
document.querySelector(".lbnx").addEventListener("click",function(){mvLB(1);});
document.querySelector(".lbcl").addEventListener("click",closeLB);
document.getElementById("lb").addEventListener("click",function(e){if(e.target===this)closeLB();});
document.addEventListener("keydown",function(e){if(!document.getElementById("lb").classList.contains("open"))return;if(e.key==="ArrowLeft")mvLB(-1);if(e.key==="ArrowRight")mvLB(1);if(e.key==="Escape")closeLB();});
document.getElementById("ua").addEventListener("click",function(){document.getElementById("fup").click();});
document.getElementById("fup").addEventListener("change",function(){addFInline(this.files);});
document.getElementById("ua").addEventListener("dragover",function(e){e.preventDefault();});
document.getElementById("ua").addEventListener("drop",function(e){e.preventDefault();addFInline(e.dataTransfer.files);});
function addFInline(files){if(!files||!files.length)return;var lbls=["Cozinha Planejada","Quarto Planejado","Home Office","Sala de Estar","Closet","Escritório","Comercial","Projeto"];Array.from(files).forEach(function(file){var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(e){F.push({s:e.target.result,l:lbls[F.length]||"Projeto"});renderGal();};r.readAsDataURL(file);});}
var io=new IntersectionObserver(function(ent){ent.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add("vis");});},{threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll(".ain").forEach(function(el){io.observe(el);});
window.addEventListener("scroll",function(){var n=document.querySelector("nav");if(n)n.style.boxShadow=window.scrollY>40?"0 4px 24px rgba(26,21,16,.1)":"none";});
renderGal();
</script>
</body>
</html>
